commands.review_summary:
Adds an embedded-runner transcript repair path that appends a missing assistant JSONL turn after duplicate-tail detection, exports the helper, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main gates post-turn transcript persistence on runner === "cli" while WebChat expects durable assistant JSONL entries. I did not live-run WebChat in this read-only review.
